title: Teltonika TRB500 Industrial 5G Gateway
description: The Teltonika TRB500 5G gateway is among the compact and energy-efficient devices with a Gigabit Ethernet interface and two configurable I/Os. The device delivers ultra-low latency 5G network speeds for critical infrastructure and high data throughput.
